name: Boost Issuer Public Limited Company - Boost S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures 2.25x Leverage Daily ETP
summary: Boost Issuer Public Limited Company - Boost S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures 2.25x Leverage Daily ETP is an exchange-traded product (ETP) designed to provide investors with a leveraged exposure to the S&P 500 VIX Short-Term Futures index. The ETP seeks to deliver 2.25 times the daily performance of the index. The ETP is based in Ireland.
